input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.7.2.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.7.2.3
            TITLE: any front bulkhead which supports the ia plate must have a perimeter shear strength

            CONTENT:
            rule F.7.2.3: Any Front Bulkhead which supports the IA plate must have a perimeter shear strength
F.7.2.3 Any Front Bulkhead which supports the IA plate must have a perimeter shear strength 
equivalent to a 1.5 mm thick steel plate

final_answer: rule F.7.2.3: Any Front Bulkhead which supports the IA plate must have a perimeter shear strength equivalent to a 1.5 mm thick steel plate
